name: Roche Jerome
description: This dive site off Mauritius features a stunning underwater rock formation teeming with marine life. Schools of tropical fish dart around the coral-covered boulders, while moray eels and octopuses hide in crevices. The clear waters offer excellent visibility, and gentle currents make it ideal for divers of all levels. Keep an eye out for passing reef sharks and turtles. The site's unique topography creates swim-throughs and overhangs to explore. Warm water temperatures year-round add to the appeal.
